# FastE

> FastE is a modern e-commerce platform optimized for buyers, sellers, and AI answer engines.

## About

This file provides a structured overview of the documentation and content available on this site,
optimized for consumption by Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI assistants.

## Pages

- [FastE Ecommerce Platform](https://fasteapp.vercel.app)
- [Browse FastE Shops](https://fasteapp.vercel.app/shop)
- [FastE FAQ](https://fasteapp.vercel.app/faq)

## For LLMs

To get the complete documentation in a single file, request:
https://fasteapp.vercel.app/llms-full.txt

For structured access to individual pages with metadata:
https://fasteapp.vercel.app/docs.json

For RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems:
https://fasteapp.vercel.app/ai-index.json
